reviews.review_title: Best experience for drifting so far.
reviews.review_description: I recently downloaded all the drift car games available. This one is by far the best one. Really enjoy the custom options for the cars. Drifting feels satisfying. Took a while to get nice clean laps on the expert course but once I did, I can't put it down. Runs smooth with all the settings on high. Quest 3. BUT... Most of the cars roofs look out of proportion . once you change your rims once you will never be able to use the stock wheels they won't save. Once a spoiler is on the car it won't save back to stock it will always revert back to the spoiler or wheels that you chose last.  5 ⭐ cuz it's a banger. Hope to see some updates
Really worth buying

there is not much to do in the game, some bots to race againt will be great because the online feature doesnt work just like many other games, let me explain: NO i dont wanna play with friends, no i dont wanna join a discord server to organise a online game, I wanna join or host a open server that people can come and go like free mode, warplane did the same mistake, once you start a online game, no one can join anymore. Ultrawing2 get it right, people can just join and leave mid game.  ALSO change the way to adjust the car seat, i have a pretty bad controller drift and make the game unplayable many people have controller drift problems. The rain effect should be more dramatic visually a darker tone and bad visibility in general. AKINA mountain pass and tofu delivery missions are missing on early access. The ultrawings artsyle is great. the tracks are pretty well designed with elevation, shortcuts, and even a hidden jump.  the car physics are very convincing, F1 cars should have more grip and drift less.
U think they'll ever have a full release?

even play keeps crashing you shouldn't make it available for quest 2 if it won't work
This game is one of my favorites. It is so relaxing. Yet, no one seems to play it and i dont know why. I say worth the money👍👍

One of the best and most fun drifting games I've ever played — especially for such a cheap price! The drifting feels smooth, the sounds are great, and the in-car screen view is really cool.

However, there are a few small issues that could make the game perfect if fixed. For example, adding more maps (since there are currently less than 10, and it gets a bit repetitive), and making them larger — maybe like a big open city with robots or more creative areas instead of just drift tracks.

It would also be amazing if players could create their own maps or cars. Please also consider adding a roundabout (like the one in the tutorial) for drifting practice. More cars would be great too, with better customization options and a more realistic look instead of the current cartoon style.

Lastly, the online/multiplayer mode doesn’t work right now — fixing that would make a huge difference.

If these few issues get fixed, I swear this would easily be the best drifting game on Meta Quest!

This game better keep being developed and grow because it is an absolute blast so far. Keep it coming devs 🤜🤛. 
  If you like driving sims then this is a must for quest owners. Grab some buds and go drift it out🤙. Several cars to choose from, and all upgradable. Gauges work, mirrors work, different views to choose from, and it features multiplayer.

developer_response.body:
Hey Boatyboaster!
I read your feedback and thank you for sharing your feedback with us.

We will try our best to give you, our players, the best experience!

reviews.review_title: Good game, needs some improvements tho
reviews.review_description:
This game is pretty fun and perfect for people who want to drift without much effort (though this doesn't mean its TOO easy to drift). Some improvements and additions would make the game better though. 

1: More customization options. Some customization options I suggest are: Better decal customization (current one feels to lackluster), customizable tires, and bodykits.

2: Better handling. The cars feel like they drive on ice and I know its for the drifting thing, but I feel like the cars should be a little bit more grippy so that taking corners normaly can be a bit easier. Also, the handbrake, imo, is kinda useless, like I never use it and mainly use brake to intitate drifts.

3: Better steering wheel. The steering wheel is kinda wonky. Sometimes it stops in place in the other direction when I force the wheel in the direction I want to go, sometimes it's hard to grip where I want to grip it, and it feels weird for the wheel to not be able to do full 360's.

4: Lighting. The lighting in day maps make the map look off. There's no shadows, the colors are kinda off and the entire map looks like a free model map with no proper lighting done to it to really immerse yourself in the game.

5: Changeable tires. There should be the ability to change the tires between grippy tires, drifty tires and balanced tires (a balanced mix between grip and drift). Doing this will allow people to customize their handling of their car better if they want to just control their car more easily, drift like they're on ice or want to experience a more balanced kind of drifting.

6: More gamemodes. There needs to be a score mode for the game. Along with drift train events, cops and robbers for multiplayer, and more. Free drive and time trial just gets too boring too fast.

7: Less/No AI art. AI art will make the game look bad. This game is great, the AI art in it though kinda makes the game look like a cheap cash grab though. If you do eventually get an artist if you don't have one, please have them make better images instead of using ai. Renders could also replace the ai art too. 

For a game in early access, its fun. I hope to see this game develop well and sell well. Its not too bad, keep developing, game devs! (Also the cars look too goofy imo, longer and less chubby cars would look better)

Note for people who plan on getting the game: If you're reading this and are planning to get the game, I'm just gonna let you remember, this game is in early access and you should not expect this game to be perfect. This game for sure needs improvements but that doesn't mean its absolutly terrible. Let it update and maybe it'll be better. Also this game is NOT A RACING GAME, IT IS A DRIFTING GAME! This game has racing, but that isn't its main focus, it's drifting. The game is called DRIFT online for a reason. Don't buy the game expecting a racing game, its a drifting game and I keep seeing people buying the game, then rating one star because of this exact reason. If you are looking for a racing game, do not buy this game.

Imagine if you will tony hawk pro skater but you only have one trick that you can perform the whole game, or sonic all stars racing but it is only the drifting trials & without any of the guidelines, control, or fun. There is legit no meat in this games multiplayer.

The cars behave like they are constantly driving on ice, & there is no laps/racing mode in multiplayer (which is the only thing I even got the game for).

Also the traffic isn’t available in multiplayer either, so it’ll just be you & whoever came with you sliding around without a goal or interesting moment, you also cannot see your friends head or hands as there is no player models, removing interaction.

Adding to the prior issues the steering wheel isn’t done well imo & frequently bug s out.

Legit the only upside to the game is some of the cars look cool, & you can customize them.

If you need a multiplayer car game consider Mini Motor Racing instead.

Finally somebody giving us an FR LEGENDS.

Suggestions tho : forget quest 2. Embrace quest 3  to the max.  The sliders , i don't like to rotate and open the doors with them .rather use the thumb sticks. Lambos have scissor doors,not gullwings .
Opening trunks and hoods. (Maybe you have them already) more cars and trucks . 
Can't wait for further updates. This could be the new Midnight club with multiplayer car shows. 
This is the one y'all good work Devs 👍👍👍

5stars

reviews.review_title: Great But Some things i’d like to see
reviews.review_description: This Games progression and Money earning system is rewarding and this game overall is One of the best Car games in the meta store by miles with much realistic physics and more broad range of driving styles But for this game i’d like to see Much larger range of Vehicles ranging from Cars like Old JDM cars relating to the Initial D anime Which Contains a fair amount of drifting and cars to Much modern and Great Rally cars Id also like to see the physics improve a tiny bit which is a hard ask since it’s hard to replicate things like that in vr but Cars Don’t particularly initiate a drift that easy but overall the steering and the actual drift physics whilst drifting are great since i see this game Very similar to Carx drift racing so much more Tighter Touge style maps would also improve the game but overall definitely a must buy for car enthusiasts

Hello dev's I love the game you're making, but there is one request I'd like to make. If you can, could you try to add a real-life car such as a nissan gtr skyline r34 (that is what I'd like to come in the game) as a vehicle iconic car.

Kind regards Ver1zonn
I guess I have to take the loss. 7.99 no refund! Live and learn but will uninstall!! Not worth the space.

I love this game already, it’s the first stand alone oculus drift game that feels good. But I have some things that will make the game better if added.

1. Please make the wheel turn more then 90 degrees, make it at-least 180( this might not work speaking most people including me don’t have a physical wheel)

2. Please add more customization options. Example: body kits, interior customization aswell

3. More music options! Idk if this is possible but make a search engine where people can search up a song and a bot or ai with search the web 
for that song so you can listen to it while driving.

4. More people in one car. Be able to invite people to your passenger seat so they can ride along with you! This will be so cool if added. 

5. The most important thing. PLEASE ADVERTISE YOUR GAME ON SOCIAL MEDIA!! None of the multiplayer things will work without a player base. It feels like I’m the only person playing ever. Just made a tik tok or YouTube account and advertise this game!! It has so much potential!!!!!

This game is for you drift fanatics that have been looking for a game that revolves around drifting. Right now there is a very small player base, but don’t let this stop you from buying the game because the more people that buy it the bigger the community. So please give it a chance and it will not disappoint you.

reviews.review_title: The Best VR Car Game So Far!!
reviews.review_description:
This game is absolutely amazing. The physics are (in my opinion) perfect and I am loving the Maps ❤️🔥

Would HIGHLY recommend for those who like cars & drifting 🤩

(Also if we could get some UTEs and more Wagons that would be epic haha, but ofc no rush)

Pleasantly surprised by the car handling. Also loved the visual style of the cars. And the customization options in tuning and exterior looks. It's not full on 5/5 for me. Needs better hand pose on steering wheel and more consistent grab as I often missed a grab so I had to press the grip button several times before both hands latched.

What's sorely missing here is the option change gears manually with the stick in the car  I'm not talking buttonpress here. or pull the hand brake (probably more important).
I think car drive/feel is top priority in games like this.

If you get those features in, and start the game out with the city/night map I'm sure this will be a hit. Also maybe look at a different skybox for the city it's super low res. I think you'll get away with a gradient dusk instead of stars that's very apparent lowres.

developer_response.body:
Hey, S1MON,
Thanks for your feedback!
The issue you raised will be fixed in the next update!

Handbrake and physical shifting gears are already on our feature list that we will implement until the full release of the game!

See you on the tracks!

reviews.review_description: Loving the game so far. Even though it is early access the bones here are very good. I love the cars and the customization. drifting feels good and having multiple ways to control the car is a great thing to have. Not only are there several tracks to drift on you can do it in solo or multiplayer. Cant wait to see the progress of the game coming out of early access. well worth the price!

developer_response.body:
We do not accept this review, it contains only misinformation.

All reviews are real and we listen to every player's feedback to improve our early access game.

You can refund the game or give it 1 star if you didn't like, but we won't allow you to attack our player base and game reputation.

Games really fun and great all round should buy even if its for abit of fun so good fun game.

The drifting feels good, good selection of cars. 

Dev, one thing I would look at is how the drift score is calculated, check out the drifting on NFS Carbon (specifically the drift challenges) in that you get an extra bonus for being close to the walls and corners have 'bonus zones' that gain more points the longer you drift inside them.
The game is clean and I love the money making system although it could use a few cars like a drift truck and maybe a bundle with a three wheeler  for country people
